title: IQOO All Stars Cup

{{DISPLAYTITLE:iQOO All Stars Cup}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=iQOO All Stars Cup |icon= |tickername=iQOO: ASC |shortname=iQOO: ASC |image=IQOO All Stars logo.png |type=Online |team_number=16 |series=iQOO All Stars Cup |organizer=iQOO ESPORTS |organizer-link=https://instagram.com/iqooesports/ |organizer2=Esports XO |organizer2-link=https://www.instagram.com/esportsxo/ |sponsor=[https://www.instagram.com/iqooind/ iQOO India] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=5,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-08-26 |edate=2021-08-31 |twitter= |instagram=iqooind |web=https://www.iqoo.com/in/products/iqooz3 |discord= |facebook= |youtube=channel/UC3-QQLDTbBBsMC5DbAeVGqg |next=IQOO_All_Stars_Cup/Season_3{{!}}Season 3 (New State) |next2=IQOO_All_Stars_Cup/Season_4{{!}}Season 4 }} '''''[https://www.instagram.com/iqooind/ iQOO India]''''' in association with '''''[https://www.instagram.com/esportsxo/ Esports XO]''''' present a Battlegrounds Mobile invitational tournament called the ''''' iQOO All Stars Cup''''' with a prize pool of ₹5,00,000 INR ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Mayavi|b1flag=in |b1name=Shubham Chawla |b2=RA1|b2name=Vipul Kumar|b2flag=in |b3=CrackJacker Gaming|b3name=Mohit Dawar |b3flag=in }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''iQOO All Stars Cup:''' 26th August 2021 to 31st August 2021.'' * ''16 Teams '' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]]'' * ''20 Matches to be played over a period of 5 days.'' * ''5 Matches to be played each day.'' ====Matchdays==== * ''5 Matchdays: 5 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''26th August''''': ''(E>>M>>S>>E>>M)'' ** '''''27nd August''''': ''(E>>M>>S>>E>>M)'' ** '''''29th August''''': ''(E>>M>>S>>E>>M)'' ** '''''30th August''''': ''(E>>M>>S>>E>>M)'' ** '''''31st August''''': ''(E>>M>>S>>E>>M)'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" !
